name: Provencal Beef Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 Can Diced Peeled Tomatoes (14.5 ounces) with juice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet over medium-high heat, cook beef and bacon until the beef is browned; drain.
2. In a 3- to 4-quart slow cooker combine gravy, tomatoes, thyme, salt, and pepper.
3. Add beef, bacon, and remaining ingredients; stir gently to combine.
4. Cover; cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours or until meat and vegetables are tender.
(Note: This recipe yields approximately 360 calories with 10 grams of fat, representing 25% of the total fat content.)
